headline: President Trump, On Social Media, Says After Meeting With The President Of Lebanon, Joseph Aoun, Who Has Done A Remarkable Job Working To Transform His Country, I Am Hereby Directing My Administration To Allow All U.S. Airline Carriers To Fly Directly To Lebanon

raw.headline: President Trump, On Social Media, Says After Meeting With The President Of Lebanon, Joseph Aoun, Who Has Done A Remarkable Job Working To Transform His Country, I Am Hereby Directing My Administration To Allow All U.S. Airline Carriers To Fly Directly To Lebanon
